subject: New Business Submission: Property + BI for Atlas Steel Fabrication Inc
body:
Hi underwriting team,

Please find a new business submission for our client, Atlas Steel Fabrication Inc, a metal fabrication manufacturer established 2004 with 320 employees across 3 locations in Houston, Texas. Total insurable value is approximately $85M. They are seeking commercial property cover including business interruption with a $50M limit and a $100k deductible, effective 01/08/2026. They are currently insured with Travelers but are open to moving. Loss history is clean for the last 3 years.

Brokerage: Summit Risk Partners (regional). Appointed with you since 2019.

Regards,
James Okafor
Account Executive, Summit Risk Partners

subject: Cyber submission - Meridian Health Systems (urgent, expiring)
body:
Hello,

We have a cyber & privacy liability submission for Meridian Health Systems, a healthcare provider with 2,400 employees operating 11 clinics across the United States. They handle protected health information and process card payments. Requesting a $10M cyber limit, effective ASAP as the current policy is expiring. They have MFA and EDR deployed. Annual revenue around $480M.

This is being marketed - incumbent is Chubb. Please advise appetite quickly.

Thanks,
Priya Shah, Vice President, Aon

subject: GL quote for BrightWave Hospitality Group
body:
Hi team,

Looking for a general liability quote for BrightWave Hospitality Group, a restaurants and hospitality operator with about 140 staff across 6 locations in Florida. Established 2016. Requesting a $5M general liability limit effective 15/09/2026. No major losses reported.

Brokerage: BrightWave Insurance Services (independent).

Cheers,
Tom Reilly

subject: Professional liability - Nimbus Analytics (tech startup)
body:
Hi,

Professional liability / E&O submission for Nimbus Analytics Ltd, a SaaS / technology company founded 2024 with 45 employees in Sydney, Australia. They provide data analytics software to enterprise clients and want $3M E&O cover, effective 01/10/2026. Annual revenue ~$6M. First commercial policy.

Brokerage: Gallagher.

Regards,
Sara Lopez, Account Manager

subject: Marine cargo + property for Harborline Logistics
body:
Hello underwriting,

We are requesting marine cargo and warehouse property coverage for Harborline Logistics, a logistics and distribution company with 780 employees and 9 warehouse locations including coastal sites in New Orleans, Louisiana. Total insurable value across the schedule is about $140M. Requesting a combined limit of $30M effective 01/11/2026. We have been trading for 22 years. Some prior cargo losses.

Please confirm appetite.

Harborline Logistics Risk Team

subject: Property cover for Big Bang Fireworks Manufacturing
body:
Hi,

New submission for Big Bang Fireworks Manufacturing, a fireworks manufacturer with 60 employees in rural Nevada. Established 2011. Seeking $20M property cover effective next month. Please quote.

Redstar Agency

subject: Boost your insurance agency rankings + buy followers!!!
body: Special offer!!! We provide SEO services and marketing services for insurance brokers. Buy followers, crypto giveaway, guaranteed leads! Unsubscribe anytime.
